name: Flower Bouquet
subject: nature
prompt: a full bouquet of mixed flowers — roses, daisies and tulips with leaves — gathered together and tied with a ribbon bow, a variety of petal shapes and sizes, clean and easy to color

name: Mountain Landscape
subject: nature
prompt: a peaceful landscape with layered mountains, a winding river running through a valley, a few pointed pine trees in the foreground, a round sun and fluffy clouds in the sky, and two small birds in the distance

name: Tree with Birds
subject: nature
prompt: a big leafy tree with a sturdy trunk and a rounded cloud-like canopy, a couple of small birds perched on the branches and one flying, a little round nest, and grass with a few flowers at the base of the trunk

name: Waterfall
subject: nature
prompt: a tall waterfall cascading down a rocky cliff into a swirling pool below, smooth flowing water lines, a few rounded boulders and ferns along the edges, and a couple of small trees on top of the cliff

name: Happy Sun
subject: nature
prompt: a big cheerful sun with a round smiling face, rosy cheeks and closed happy eyes, wide pointed and wavy rays spreading out all around it, a few simple puffy clouds drifting nearby, bold and very easy to color

name: Pine Forest
subject: nature
prompt: a cluster of tall pointed pine trees of different heights standing close together, a narrow path winding between the trunks, a couple of small bushes and rocks on the ground, and a few birds in the sky above the treetops

name: Single Leaf
subject: nature
prompt: one large detailed leaf shown up close, a clear central vein with branching smaller veins fanning out to gently serrated edges, a short stem at the bottom, simple and bold for easy coloring

name: Cactus Garden
subject: nature
prompt: a group of friendly potted cacti of different shapes — a tall saguaro with two arms, a round barrel cactus, and a small prickly pear — each with tiny dot spines and one with a little flower on top, lined up in decorated pots

name: Calm River
subject: nature
prompt: a gentle river winding between grassy banks toward the horizon, smooth ripple lines on the water, a few smooth stones and cattails along the edges, a small wooden bridge crossing it, and rolling hills in the distance

name: Vegetable Garden
subject: nature
prompt: a tidy garden with neat rows of growing vegetables — leafy carrot tops, round cabbages, and climbing bean vines on a little fence — a small watering can and a sun hat resting on the soil, and a low picket fence around the edge

name: Fluffy Clouds
subject: nature
prompt: a few big soft puffy clouds floating across the sky at different heights, each with smooth rounded bumpy edges, one cloud with a gentle smiling face, and a couple of small birds gliding between them

name: Autumn Tree
subject: nature
prompt: a tree in autumn with a textured trunk and bare and leafy branches, lots of detailed maple and oak leaves on the branches and several drifting and scattered on the ground below, a small pile of raked leaves to one side
